pillar: Vibe Outreach — prompt-driven AI sales automation like Vibe Coding but for outreach

pieces.hook: Vibe Coding changed how people build. Vibe Outreach is doing the same to how people sell.
pieces.angle: Naval's vibe coding = new PM thesis applied to sales. Describe who to reach, how to reach them, hit run — Sbl does the rest.

pieces.hook: Built a fintech at 16. 10,000 users. Shut down by regulators.
pieces.angle: Crito story — what it taught about regulatory risk and why most founders treat compliance as a later-stage problem

pieces.hook: Vibe Outreach levels — the faster you hit level 5, the more pipeline you build
pieces.angle: Adaptation of the viral vibe coding levels format applied to B2B outreach. Level 0 = manual cold emails. Level 5 = write a prompt, Sbl runs the campaign.
One-liner punchline post about Sbl.so product velocity — Post Engagement Leads, Fractional SDRs, ICP Filter, Smart Followups, etc.
Short punchy tweet adapting the viral vibe coding levels format for B2B outreach. Ends with Sbl.so.

pieces.hook: Built a fintech at 16. 10,000 users. Shut down by regulators.
pieces.angle: Ultra-short punchy tweet version of the Crito story — one paragraph max, ends with the lesson.

pieces.hook: Vibe Coding changed how people build. Vibe Outreach is doing the same to how people sell.
pieces.angle: Thread format — starts with the Naval vibe coding thesis, draws the parallel to sales, walks through how Vibe Outreach works with Sbl.so, ends with a CTA.

pieces.hook: How I'd rebuild our outreach system from scratch in 2026
pieces.angle: Step-by-step thread — old way vs. Vibe Campaign approach. What prompt to write. What Sbl handles. What still needs human judgment.

pieces.hook: From prompt to pipeline: the Vibe Outreach workflow
pieces.angle: Slide-by-slide visual breakdown — old way vs. new way. Prompt to campaign to conversations to pipeline. Final slide: Sbl.so.

pieces.hook: Built a fintech at 16. 10,000 users. Shut down by regulators.
pieces.angle: Founder story carousel — each slide is a chapter: the build, the growth, the shutdown, the lesson, what it changed about how you build Sbl.so.
